title: Agent docs
description: The tabbed AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md editor with the synthetic ⚙ Sections library and template checklist, opened from each terminal's 📋 title-bar button (split out of the editor mod, #120). Rides ctx.windows.onTerminalCreate; reuses the editor's text-editor window kind, so persistence stays byte-identical. Requires the Text editor mod.
author: JohnConnorNPC
